description: Balanced supply chain resilience across redundancy flexibility visibility coordination adaptation equity infrastructure exposure and implementation burden.
Prioritizes backup suppliers alternative routes strategic inventory reserve capacity and reduced single-point failure.
Prioritizes rapid rerouting input substitution logistics flexibility and production adjustment.
Prioritizes tier mapping real-time monitoring bottleneck detection and supply network visibility.
Prioritizes public-private coordination supplier communication allocation mechanisms and emergency response coherence.
Prioritizes ports energy cold chains water transport and logistics infrastructure under climate stress.
Prioritizes labor safeguards small supplier resilience affordability human rights and environmental justice.
Penalizes systemic exposure concentration chokepoints climate exposure cyber exposure and geopolitical dependency.
Penalizes implementation burden when administrative finance legal technical or political capacity is constrained.
